features.title: 3D Vector Memory
features.description: Your memory is not a flat list — it's a living 3D space. Octree-indexed, semantically searchable, and φ-scaled for natural retrieval. Ask anything about your past conversations and get precise, contextual answers instantly.

features.title: Agent Dashboard
features.description: Command all 20+ Heady™ agents from a single pane of glass. Spawn agents, assign tasks, monitor progress, review outputs, and adjust priorities — with full visibility into what every agent is doing right now.

features.title: Universal Search
features.description: One search bar reaches everything: your memories, agent history, documents, conversations, and connected integrations. Semantic search powered by pgvector understands intent, not just keywords.

features.title: Cross-Device Sync
features.description: Your HeadyMe identity, memory, and agent state follow you from desktop to phone to tablet and back — in real time. No manual sync, no lost context, no starting over.

features.title: Persistent Context
features.description: Unlike stateless AI tools, HeadyMe maintains full session continuity. Your preferences, decisions, and conversation history accumulate into a rich personal context that makes every interaction smarter than the last.

features.title: Privacy Controls
features.description: You own your data. Fine-grained privacy controls let you select what agents remember, what syncs to the cloud, and what stays local. Export or delete your memory at any time with full transparency.

features.title: Heady Identity
features.description: Your HeadyMe account is your universal identity across the entire Heady™ ecosystem — one login, one profile, one memory layer that powers every product from HeadyBuddy to HeadyAPI.

features.title: AI Workflows
features.description: Chain agents together into automated workflows triggered by events, schedules, or conversational commands. Build pipelines that research, synthesize, write, and deliver — all without leaving your dashboard.
